channel.title: The Piece Hall Yorkshire Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events from The Piece Hall.

item.title: Free Summer Crafting
item.description: Free Summer Crafting Join us for our free drop-in Summer Crafting Sessions on The Courtyard EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY! From 11-2, our wonderful team of volunteers will be on hand to help you create some exciting summer crafts. Sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the summer holidays except for Thurs
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n

item.title: Tom Grennan
item.description: Tom Grennan + FINN ASKEW & FIONA-LEE Multi-platinum-selling artist Tom Grennan will bring his electrifying live show to Halifax next summer, joined by special guests Finn Askew and Fiona-Lee. The chart-topping BRIT and Ivor Novello-nominated star will head to TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Sunday 26 July. I

item.title: Gary Numan
item.description: Gary Numan + LADYTRON Electronic music pioneer, celebrated songwriter and globally renowned musician Gary Numan will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Friday 31 July, joined by special guests Ladytron. item.title: The K’s
item.description: The K\'s + TOM A. SMITH & LADY OF MARS Explosive indie rockers The K’s are returning to Halifax next summer for their first ever headline show at TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 8 August. They will be joined by special guests Tom A. Smith and Lady of Mars. Tickets... \n

item.title: Jimmy Eat World
item.description: Jimmy Eat World + RISE AGAINST & THE GET UP KIDS Arizona rock icons Jimmy Eat World have announced their live return to the UK with three huge outdoor headline shows taking place in August 2026…and they kick off in Halifax. item.title: Holly Johnson
item.description: Holly Johnson + ABC & HEAVEN 17 Singer-songwriter and 80s icon Holly Johnson will bring a taste of Hollywood to Halifax as he headlines a spectacular night next summer. item.title: The Wombats
item.description: The Wombats + CIRCA WAVES, CHERYHOLT & THE CAYMANS Indie giants The Wombats are headlining what promises to be another unforgettable celebration in Halifax next summer. item.title: Hollywood Vampires
item.description: Hollywood Vampires + THE DAMNED American rock supergroup Hollywood Vampires will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 22 August. item.title: Public Service Broadcasting
item.description: Public Service Broadcasting + THE BIG MOON Cinematic rock pioneers Public Service Broadcasting are today revealed as the 42nd and final headliners for TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall 2026. item.title: Turnstile
item.description: Turnstile + DYNAMITE Fresh from their double triumph at the GRAMMY Awards, Turnstile have confirmed a massive UK EXCLUSIVE headline show here at The Piece Hall. item.title: Bastille
item.description: Bastille + NECTAR WOODE Multi-platinum selling indie pop band Bastille is the latest headline artist heading to Halifax next summer. item.title: Scissor Sisters
item.description: Scissor Sisters + BIMINI & THE HIDDEN CAMERAS Halifax will sizzle next summer as Scissor Sisters are bringing their iconic glam-pop spectacle to the town.
